phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP Intercidades waiting area is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a sala de espera do CP Intercidades?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee es-TAH lo-ka-lee-ZAH-dah ah SA-lah jee-es-PEH-rah dooz-in-ter-see-DAH-djeez
phrases.cultural_note: Long-distance waiting areas are typically reserved near main concourses for premium service passengers.

likely_response.local: Fica no átrio central, perto das bilheteiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO AHTR-yoo sayngt-RAHL, PEHR-too DUHSH bee-lyih-TAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's in the central hall, near the ticket offices.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the SMTUC bus ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira da SMTUC?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ZMTOOK?
phrases.cultural_note: Intermodal ticketing points are often clustered together to simplify transfers between rail and city buses.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o ponto de ligação SMTUC.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH lee-guh-SOWN ZMTOOK.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the SMTUC connection point.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the SMTUC connection point.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH lee-guh-SOWN ZMTOOK.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o ponto de ligação SMTUC.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the SMTUC bus ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira dos autocarros SMTUC?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH ow-too-KAH-roosh ZMTOOK?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transit booths are usually positioned near street-level exits to streamline passenger flow.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de informações ou pergunte a um funcionário da estação, que lhe indicará o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH shtuh-SOWN, KIH LYIH een-dee-kuh-RAH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the information desk or ask a station employee, who will show you the exact location.

responses.english: Go to the information desk or ask a station employee, who will show you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH shtuh-SOWN, KIH LYIH een-dee-kuh-RAH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao balcão de informações ou pergunte a um funcionário da estação, que lhe indicará o local exato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the platform underpass tunnel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o túnel de passagem inferior das plataformas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW TOO-nihl DIH puh-SAH-zhayng een-fih-REEOHR DUHSH pluh-tuh-FOH-ruh-muhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The underpass connects platforms via the main concourse, a stable feature of the station.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o túnel.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the underpass tunnel.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the underpass tunnel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW TOO-nihl.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o túnel.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a área de espera do CP Intercidades?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH AH-reeuh DIH SHPEH-ruh DOO seh-PEH een-tih-ruh-see-DAH-dihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a área de espera do CP Intercidades. Se precisar de mais ajuda, dirija-se ao Balcão de Informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-reeuh DIH SHPEH-ruh DOO seh-PEH een-tih-ruh-see-DAH-dihsh. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP Intercidades waiting area. If you need further assistance, go to the Information Desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the CP Intercidades waiting area. If you need further assistance, go to the Information Desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-reeuh DIH SHPEH-ruh DOO seh-PEH een-tih-ruh-see-DAH-dihsh. SIH prih-see-ZAHR DIH MEYESH uh-ZHOO-duh, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a área de espera do CP Intercidades. Se precisar de mais ajuda, dirija-se ao Balcão de Informações.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde se encontra o balcão de consignas?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH koong-SEEG-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Consigna offices in Portugal are staffed counters requiring ID and exact change for short-term storage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the platform underpass tunnel is
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao túnel de acesso às plataformas?

phrases.cultural_note: Underpass tunnels are standard in Portuguese stations to safely cross multiple active tracks.
